positive: A vibrant, abstract depiction of a celestial creature—a stylized mythical griffin—made of swirling nebulae, stained glass shards, and glowing geometric patterns. The griffin is positioned centrally, facing forward in a commanding, elegant pose, forming a strong, clean silhouette against a deep, midnight blue and indigo background. The artwork should utilize striking contrast: neon electric teal, warm gold, and deep amethyst purples for the glowing elements, set against the dark background. Ideal for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer. High contrast, minimal detail bleeding, perfect for apparel. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Cosmic Abstract.
negative: low quality, blurry, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, logo, signature, grain, messy background, cluttered, washed out, dull colors, realistic human
